notes: v1.2.55: Full refactor - implemented reactive ActionListModel with QAbstractListModel, converted timeline from QGraphicsView to QListView with delegate, timeline now updates reactively when actions are added. v1.2.54: Reverted partial reactive model implementation - too massive for current issue. v1.2.53: Added strict validation for image_data (type check, length check), fixed extra_images defensive join, changed if act to if act is not None. v1.2.52: Added debug prints and guards to check if image data is None before use. v1.2.51: Made _do_capture synchronous - returns result directly instead of callback to prevent crash. v1.2.50: Fixed indentation error in modernized image_dialog.py that prevented dialog from opening. v1.2.49: Using user-provided modernized image_dialog.py with QDialog modal overlay approach. v1.2.48: Revert to non-modal QWidget overlay with callback - no nested exec(), no hiding parent, should fix crash. v1.2.47: Converted CaptureOverlay to QDialog with modal exec() to match v1.1.0 tkinter approach - should fix grey screen and crash issues. v1.2.46: Removed WA_ShowWithoutActivating from CaptureOverlay to fix mouse event blocking, added logging to track dialog result. v1.2.45: Using minimize() instead of hide(). v1.2.44: Removed hide/show cycle, fixed debug log truncation.
